intro.p1: Welcome to the information page about our future subscription system. Open testing phase is active.

bonusInfo.title: 🎉 Updated Subscription Bonus Tiers!
bonusInfo.p2: We have updated the terms for automatic bonuses for the most active club players.
bonusInfo.p3: Now you can get a premium tier for free — just by playing in team tournaments 🏆
bonusInfo.p4: Every day, the system analyzes your activity over the last 30 days (tournaments, points, and games) and awards activity points.
bonusInfo.p5: Depending on the amount, one of the tiers is assigned:
bonusInfo.p6: ✨ The tier is recalculated automatically and may change depending on your activity.
bonusInfo.p7: No applications needed — just play, and the system will do everything itself ✅
bonusInfo.p8: Thank you for supporting the club ❤️♟

insufficientCoins.subMessage: You can learn more about how to top up your balance on the pricing page.

feedback.loadFailed: Failed to load puzzle. It might not exist.

finish-him.title: Finish Him
finish-him.content: First solve a tactical puzzle, then prove your advantage in the endgame against your chosen engine. Skill Points are awarded for wins and equal the sum of material on the board (♟=1, ♞♝=3, ♜=5, ♛=9). Draws and losses give no points. Completion time is also recorded for leaderboards.

tornado.title: Tornado
tornado.content: Four time controls available: 1+1, 3+2, 5+3, and 10+5 (separate rating in each). Solve as many puzzles as possible within the time limit. Rating calculated using the Glicko2 system based on puzzle difficulty and time spent. Each solved puzzle awards 1 Skill Point.

topFinishHim.title: Finish Him Records
topFinishHim.content: Player rankings by points earned in the 'Finish Him' mode. Points are awarded for each successfully completed task. You can switch between themes to see the leaders in each category.

theoryLeaderboard.title: Theory Records
theoryLeaderboard.content: Player rankings by points earned in theoretical endgames. You can switch between themes to see the leaders in each category.

practicalLeaderboard.title: Practical Chess Records
practicalLeaderboard.content: Player rankings based on results in practical endgames. Points are awarded for each correctly solved task.

overallSkill.title: Overall Skill Rating
overallSkill.content: Total Skill Points earned across all game modes for the selected period: week, 14 days, 21 days, or month. Skill Points equal the material sum (♟=1, ♞♝=3, ♜=5, ♛=9) in Finish Him mode. In Tornado mode, each puzzle awards 1 point. Only wins count.

skillStreak.title: Daily Streak Rating
skillStreak.content: Tracks players who earn at least 100 Skill Points every consecutive day in any mode. Rating based on the number of consecutive days. Missing a day resets the streak. This encourages regular activity and consistent improvement.

skillStreakMega.title: Tornado +300 Every Day
skillStreakMega.content: For the absolute elite: a streak of earning at least 300 Skill Points in Tornado mode daily. Shows the most dedicated and disciplined players. Missing a day in the mode resets the streak.

topToday.title: Top Today
topToday.content: Shows players who earned the most Skill Points during today. The rating resets daily at midnight.

tornadoLeaderboard.title: Tornado Rating
tornadoLeaderboard.content: Ranks players by their highest rating achieved in Tornado mode. Rating calculated using the Glicko2 system based on solved puzzle difficulty and time spent.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.subtitle: Information according to § 5 DDG
imprint.name: Sergej Siemens, M.Eng.
imprint.vatId: Value Added Tax Identification Number according to § 27 a of the Value Added Tax Act: DE366185109
imprint.disputeRefusal: Consumer dispute resolution: We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
imprint.liabilityContent: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content according to general laws (§ 7 Para. 1 DDG). There is no obligation to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information (§§ 8-10 DDG). Upon becoming aware of legal violations, we will immediately remove corresponding content or links to external third-party websites. No liability is assumed for external content.
imprint.copyrightContent: The content created by us on these pages is subject to German copyright law. Duplication, processing, and any kind of exploitation outside the limits of copyright law require written consent. Downloads and copies are only permitted for private use.

introParagraphs: The protection of your personal data is an important concern for us. We follow the 'Privacy by Design' approach: We only process data that is technically absolutely necessary for the operation of the app.
Controller within the meaning of the GDPR:
logfilesParagraphs: Each time the website is accessed, our system automatically collects data and information from the computer system of the accessing computer. The following data is collected:
Legal basis: Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. f GDPR (Legitimate Interest). Storage serves IT security and the defense against attack attempts. Logfiles are automatically deleted after a maximum of 14 days.
hostingParagraphs: Our app is hosted on servers of netcup GmbH (Karlsruhe, Germany). We have concluded an order processing agreement (AVV) with the provider in accordance with Art. 28 GDPR to ensure that your data is processed strictly according to our instructions and in compliance with the GDPR.
lichessParagraphs: You can log in to EXTRAPAWN via your Lichess account using the OAuth 2.0 procedure.
Process: You will be redirected to Lichess and authorize access there.
Data: We receive your username from Lichess and link it to your EXTRAPAWN profile.
Purpose: Provision of core functions (analysis of your games).
Legal basis: Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. b GDPR (Contract Fulfillment).
paymentParagraphs: For the conclusion of subscriptions, we use the services of Polar.sh and Stripe.

Processing: When you upgrade, your payment data is collected and processed directly by Polar/Stripe. We do not store credit card data on our own servers at any time. For more information on data processing, please refer to the Polar.sh privacy policy:
storageParagraphs: EXTRAPAWN does not use marketing cookies. We only use the 'Local Storage' of your browser to store technically necessary settings:
Login status (Auth-Token): To keep you logged in.
Language settings (i18n): So the app appears in your preferred language.
UI settings: e.g., your chosen board design.
Legal basis: Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. f GDPR. This data is strictly necessary for the operation of the app; consent (cookie banner) is therefore not required.
fontsParagraphs: Fonts: We do not use external services like Google Fonts. All fonts (e.g., Ubuntu) are served locally from our own servers.
Tracking: We do not use analysis tools (like Google Analytics) or marketing pixels.
rightsParagraphs: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
Right to rectification or erasure (Art. 16/17 GDPR)
Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR)
You also have the right to complain to a data protection supervisory authority about the processing of your personal data by us.

introParagraphs: These Terms and Conditions apply to the use of the EXTRAPAWN platform, operated by Sergej Siemens, M.Eng., Schuhbauerstraße 19, 84166 Adlkofen (hereinafter referred to as 'Provider').
sections.subjectTitle: 2. Subject of Contract and Performance Description
subjectParagraphs: (1) EXTRAPAWN is an analysis and training platform for chess players. The platform is operated on a freemium model.
(2) Free Basic Version: Users can use basic functions without charge. There is no claim to the permanent availability of these functions.

(3) Paid Subscription (Pro): The paid main service includes access to advanced training modules, in particular an extensive database for tactical puzzles and endgame training (theoretical and practical nature).

(4) Additional Functions (Statistics/AI): The provider may provide graphical analyses, statistics, and AI-supported evaluations as part of the subscription. These functions are expressly voluntary additional services. They are not part of the guaranteed quality of the Pro version. The provider reserves the right to change, expand, or remove these functions at any time as part of technical further development.
sections.contractTitle: 3. Conclusion of Contract and Payment Processing
contractParagraphs: (1) The acquisition of subscriptions takes place via the service provider Polar.sh (Merchant of Record). The terms and conditions of Polar.sh apply additionally.
(2) The contract for the subscription is concluded as soon as the user has successfully completed the payment process at Polar.sh.
sections.withdrawalTitle: 4. Right of Withdrawal for Digital Content
withdrawalParagraphs: By purchasing a subscription and immediately providing the digital content, the user expressly agrees that the provider begins with the execution of the contract before the expiry of the withdrawal period. The user confirms his knowledge that he loses his right of withdrawal through this consent. A corresponding checkbox is provided in the checkout process.
terminationParagraphs: (1) Subscriptions have the chosen duration (e.g., monthly or yearly).
(2) Termination is possible at any time without notice to the end of the paid period.
(3) After termination, the Pro functions remain fully available until the end of the already paid period. A refund of already paid amounts will not be made.
liabilityParagraphs: (1) The provider is liable without limitation in cases of intent or gross negligence and in the event of injury to life, body, or health.

(2) In cases of slight negligence, the provider is only liable for the breach of an essential contractual obligation (cardinal obligation). In this case, liability is limited to the typical damage foreseeable at the time the contract was concluded.

(3) Liability for the loss of game data, statistics, or progress values as part of the voluntary additional services (see § 2 Para. 4) is excluded, unless intentional action is involved. The user is responsible for securing his data generated at Lichess.
sections.changesTitle: 7. Changes to the App and the Terms
changesParagraphs: The provider is entitled to adapt the app within the scope of technical improvement and further development (update right). Significant changes to the terms will be communicated to the user in a timely manner.

about.title: EXTRAPAWN
about.intro: is a professional chess training ecosystem designed to bridge the gap between amateur play and Grandmaster-level preparation through deep analysis and realistic AI sparring.

modes.conversion: Master the art of winning won positions. Proves your advantage against elite engines until Mate or clear resignation.
modes.automaticTacticalTrainer: Our flagship mode. Transform the discovery of brilliant moves into a repeatable skill. Use Gravity Maps to find 'Diamonds', refute blunders, and secure achievements by replaying lines from memory.
modes.botSelectionIntro: Choose your sparring partner based on your training goals:

bots.badgyal-8: (BadGyal-8 - Aggressive tactical opponent optimized for classification)
bots.maia-2200: (Maia-2200 - Master-level human-like play and realistic error patterns)
bots.maia-1900: (Maia-1900 - Club-level human-like play with typical amateur traps)

modes.userCabinet: Your personal command center. Visualize your technical DNA with Nightingale Rose charts across 25+ tactical themes.
modes.analysisPanel: Professional variations management, infinite-depth tree navigation, and real-time MozerBook validation.

features.lichessIntegration: Safe OAuth login and direct linking of achievements to your Lichess profile.
features.advancedStats: Track your progress through Novice, Pro, and Master tiers in every endgame and opening chapter.
features.puzzleDatabase: Leveraging the high-quality Lichess puzzle and evaluation databases:
features.modernUI: A premium, high-performance interface built with Vue.js 3.5 and strict TypeScript.
features.localization: Full support for English, German, and Russian localized environments.

techStack.frontendStack: Vue 3.5 (Composition API), Vite, Pinia, Naive UI

about.contributing: We welcome all contributions to make EXTRAPAWN the ultimate training tool! If you have ideas or found a bug, please create an issue or a PR on GitHub.

licenseAndAcknowledgements.gplIntro: This project is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0, promoting transparency and community growth.

stockfish.title: Stockfish 18
stockfish.text1: Analysis and truth-seeking are powered by
stockfish.text2: , the world's strongest open-source chess engine.
stockfish.gplNote: In accordance with the GPLv3, our source code is open and available for the benefit of the global chess community.
stockfish.projectSourceCode: Source Code: Repository public on GitHub
stockfish.gratitude: Deepest gratitude to the Stockfish team for defining the standard of chess evaluation.

maia.title: Maia & BadGyal-8
maia.text: Realistic sparring is provided by **Maia Chess** and specialized **BadGyal-8** weights. These neural networks are trained on millions of games to predict moves that feel human, not mechanical. Special thanks to the CSSLab and dkappe for these incredible weights.

lcZero.title: Leela Chess Zero (LCZero)
lcZero.text: Our neural engine layer runs on **LCZero**, the pioneering open-source engine that brought AI-driven chess to the masses. Respect to the LCZero community.

chessground.title: Chessground
chessground.text1: Board rendering is powered by the ultra-fast
chessground.gratitude: Thank you, Lichess, for the best board renderer in the world.

chessops.title: Chessops
chessops.text: Move generation, legality checks, and PGN/FEN parsing are handled by the modular **Chessops** library.
chessops.gratitude: A vital tool for any modern chess application.

credits.lichess: Lichess.org - For the API, puzzle DB, and evaluation sets.
credits.n8n: n8n.io - The flexible nervous system of our backend orchestration.
credits.community: All contributors and testers who help refine the dream of perfect training.

author.title: The Mission & The Maker
author.bioPart1: I'm Moser, a mechanical engineer and lifelong chess student. Born in Kazakhstan (1985), living in Germany (2003).
author.bioPart2: EXTRAPAWN is my dream of a professional tool that empowers players to study effectively, which only became possible through modern AI and workflow automation.
author.bioPart3: Fluent in Russian and German, always polishing my English. Thank you for joining this journey!

about.footerNote: Built with ❤️ for those who seek chess mastery.

welcome.slogan: Consistency is the key to mastery.
welcome.loginPrompt: Or log in to access all features:
